title: Extended Resource Local Identifier (0x22)
description: Layout for triplet 0x22: ResType and ResLID fields as defined in the MO:DCA table.
notes: Offsets are relative to the triplet start. This layout omits the length and Tid bytes (those are handled by the loader).

elements.name: ResLID
elements.description: Extended resource local ID (4 bytes). Range X'00000000' - X'FFFFFFFF'. Interpretation may vary by ResType.
